Import from Paper List

Take a photo of your bondpaper class list — AI will read and enroll the students automatically.

Step 1 — Target Section
Step 2 — Upload Photo
📃

Tap to take photo or upload image

Photo of handwritten or printed bondpaper class list.
Columns needed: Name · LRN · Parent CP No.

Ready
Format Guide

Your bondpaper list just needs three columns — in any order — and a header row so the AI knows what each column is. Handwritten or printed both work.

── SAMPLE LAYOUT ──────────────────
FULL NAMELRNPARENT CP NO.
Juan dela Cruz10344567000109171234567
Maria Santos10344567000209281234567
… and so on
💡 Tips for best results:
• Lay paper flat under good lighting
• Shoot straight down — avoid angles
• Make sure all rows are inside the frame
• LRN must be exactly 12 digits
• Contact number: 09xxxxxxxxx format
After AI reads the list, you'll get a review table where you can correct any field before saving. Duplicates are detected and skipped automatically.

Review Extracted Students

Check and correct any fields before saving.
